def positive_view_or_handler_constructs_orm_query_directly():
    rule_id = "view_or_handler_constructs_orm_query_directly"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "View or route handler builds an ORM query rather than delegating to a repository or service."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
